prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含原理科）最低位次约3478→3311→3254→4357→5943。2021–2023年理科位次在3254–3478区间窄幅波动，2024年因新高考改革位次后移至4357 ，2025年进一步后移至5943，近两年累计后移约2690名，呈明显后移趋势；该校在贵州物理类招生计划：2021年32人、2022年30人、2023年29人、2024年34人、 2025年37人；2026年计划56人，较2025年大幅扩招19人（+51.4%），显著扩招使竞争明显缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名约第3 5名，近年排名稳定在33–35名区间，属于全国顶尖财经类院校；近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音热度排名第99位（一般），短视频平台 关注度不高，报考心理受舆论干扰较小；应用经济学A+、工商管理A+、理论经济学A、统计学A-，共4个A-及以上学科，财经学科实力全国顶尖，对理科高分考生 吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 金融/财经/经济类专业热度分化观望，计算机类、电子信息/通信等工科专业高热推荐，但该校以财经类专业为主，整体热度平稳；本省2026 年高考总人数约29.9万，较2025年（约29.7万）小幅增加；上海财经大学位于上海，地域吸引力强；该校在贵州招生总人数2021 年43人、2025年54人，呈增长趋势，2026年物理类大幅扩招至56人，体现对贵州生源的重视。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2024–2025年位次连续后移趋势、2026年物理类大幅扩招51.4% （竞争明显缓解）及本省考生总数小幅增加；预测2026年物理类最低位次约7825名，区间7325–8325名。

- 会计学（ACCA）
- 会计学

- 财政学类（财政学、税收学）
- 财务管理（智能化）

- 保险学（智能精算与大数据）。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间7325–8325名内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次优于区间下限（7325名以内）可重点冲击金融学、会计学等王牌专业；位次接近区 间上限（8325名附近）应以三档工商管理类、公共管理类稳妥保底。2026年大幅扩招，报考机会增加，可适度冲高。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including former Science Category) were approximately 3478 → 3311 → 3254 → 4357 → 5943. From 2021 to 2023, science rankings fluctuated narrowly between 3254 and 3478. In 2024, due to the new college entrance examination reform, rankings shifted back to 4357, and further shifted back to 5943 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2690 places over the past two years, showing a clear backward trend. The university's enrollment plan in Guizhou for Physics Category: 32 in 2021, 30 in 2022, 29 in 2023, 34 in 2024, 37 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 56, a significant expansion of 19 students (+51.4%) compared to 2025, significantly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 35th in the main ranking of Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities, with stable rankings in the 33–35 range in recent years, belonging to the top financial and economic universities nationwide. Its reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or record of admission gaps. Douyin popularity ranking is 99th (average), with low attention on short video platforms, so the impact of public opinion on application psychology is minimal. Applied Economics A+, Business Administration A+, Theoretical Economics A, Statistics A-, with a total of 4 A- and above disciplines, making its financial and economic disciplines top nationally, strongly attracting high-scoring science candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of finance/accounting/economics majors is mixed and cautious, while computer science, electronic information/communication and other engineering majors are highly recommended, but the university mainly focuses on financial and economic majors, so overall popularity is stable. The total number of candidates in the province for the 2026 college entrance examination is about 299,000, a slight increase from about 297,000 in 2025. Shanghai University of Finance and Economics is located in Shanghai, with strong regional appeal. The total number of students enrolled in Guizhou increased from 43 in 2021 to 54 in 2025, showing a growth trend, and the Physics Category enrollment in 2026 significantly expands to 56, reflecting the importance placed on Guizhou students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the continuous backward trend of rankings in 2024–2025, the significant 51.4% expansion of Physics Category in 2026 (significantly easing competition), and the slight increase in the total number of candidates in the province; it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 7825, with a range of 7325–8325.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Economics (Double Degree).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Public Finance (Public Finance, Taxation)

- Mathematics (including Double Degree)

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Business Administration
- Public Administration
- E-commerce (Business Intelligence)
- Information Management and Information Systems.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 7325–8325, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (within 7325), you can focus on aiming for top majors like Finance and Accounting; if your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 8325), you should safely fall back on Tier 3 majors like Business Administration and Public Administration. With the significant expansion in 2026, application opportunities increase, so you can moderately aim higher.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including former Liberal Arts) was approximately 600 → 445 → 369 → 2693 → 913. From 2021 to 2023, the liberal arts ranking continued to move forward (600 → 445 → 369). In 2024, due to the first year of the new Gaokao reform in Guizhou, the History Category ranking plummeted to 2693; in 2025, it quickly rebounded to 913, approaching the pre-reform level, indicating a recovery in application enthusiasm. There has been significant fluctuation in the past two years, with the 2025 baseline around 913. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Guizhou: 11 in 2021, 10 in 2022, 12 in 2023, 17 in 2024, 17 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 16, a reduction of 1 (-5.9%) compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 35th in the main ranking of Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities, with a stable ranking in the 33–35 range in recent years, belonging to the top national finance and economics institutions; reputation has been stable in recent years, with no obvious negative public opinion or record of file-dropping; Douyin popularity ranking is 99th (average), with low attention on short video platforms, so application psychology is less affected by public opinion; Applied Economics A+, Business Administration A+, Theoretical Economics A, Statistics A-, a total of 4 A- and above disciplines, with top-tier strength in finance and economics, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: After a significant cooling in 2022, the popularity of finance/finance/economics majors stabilized in a state of differentiation and observation from 2023 to 2024, with overall popularity steady; the total number of Gaokao candidates in the province in 2026 is about 299,000, a slight increase from 2025 (about 297,000), leading to slightly increased competition; Shanghai University of Finance and Economics is located in Shanghai, which has a strong appeal to candidates in this province; the total number of students enrolled in Guizhou (including both liberal arts and sciences) increased from 43 in 2021 to 54 in 2025, showing a growth trend, but the History Category plan slightly decreased in 2026.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the recovery trend of the 2025 ranking rebounding to 913, the 2026 History Category plan reducing by 1 (slightly intensifying competition), and a small increase in the total number of candidates in the province; it is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be approximately 851, with a range of 723–979.
